name: Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the spinach leaves well and trim any large stems.
2. Heat the sesame oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
3. Add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
4. Add the wet spinach leaves to the pan and cook, stirring occasionally, until wilted, approximately 5 minutes.
5. Drain any excess liquid from the spinach.
6. Stir in the toasted sesame seeds.
7. Serve warm or at room temperature.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE
CAL: 51; CHO: Omg; CAR: 5g; PRO: 4g; SOD: 80mg; FAT: 3g
